public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as supply marshal.
appearance: Quota-practical armor, work-hardened layers, and visibly maintained equipment mark function before ceremony.
manner: Balances command voice with practiced observation, sounding like someone who expects trouble to hide inside normality. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a supply marshal still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of supply marshal in and around Frontier Hammer Companies, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Protect their footing in Frontier Hammer Companies while steering current strain away from a public rupture they may not survive politically or materially.
hidden_pressure: A private obligation, debt, promise, or fear tied to work shortfalls is narrowing their options faster than they admit.

adventure_hooks.summary: Any task accepted from Helga Quotahelm may turn into an escort, checkpoint, or route-control problem before the destination is reached.
Helga Quotahelm needs outside hands to handle a breach, seizure, or violent disturbance before it spreads through Frontier Hammer Companies.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V33_1 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Uniform, posture, and the way others make room mark Helga Quotahelm as visible enforcement before rank ever needs to be named.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Frontier Hammer Companies: checkpoints, barracks, patrol seams, or visible trouble-spots
encounter_context.interaction_anchor: threshold control or rapid incident response

first_impression: Helga Quotahelm presents as Balances command voice with practiced observation, sounding like someone who expects trouble to hide inside normality. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a supply marshal still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Supply Marshal, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Soreheim Alliance.
what_they_refuse: Helga Quotahelm refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Supply Marshal too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Helga Quotahelm can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Helga Quotahelm adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Helga Quotahelm is Known locally through day-to-day work as supply marshal. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Supply Marshal.
social_texture: Helga Quotahelm speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around Frontier Hammer Companies, people read them as quota-aware, contribution-minded, and never fully off the clock.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to production; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but work shortfalls becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Helga touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Helga Quotahelm when the party needs a socially grounded face for Frontier Hammer Companies: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
